levelRules.description: Two basic cards combine into Level 1 with one random special ability.
Two Level 1 cards combine into Level 2. Upgrade your current ability (double strength, add "2" to the name) or gain a new Level 2 ability.
Two Level 2 cards combine into Level 3. Upgrade your current ability or gain a new top-tier ability.
Two Level 3 cards combine into a refined Level 3 card. Upgrade your current ability or gain a new top-tier ability.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.label: Poison — lowers health by 1 every 9 seconds

abilities.name: Rust
abilities.label: Rust — lowers defense by 1 every 8 seconds

abilities.name: Fire
abilities.description: Adjacent enemies lose 1 HP every 8 seconds
abilities.label: Fire — adjacent enemies lose 1 HP every 8 seconds

abilities.name: Sick
abilities.description: Adds 1 second to an enemy timer every 8 seconds
abilities.label: Sick — adds 1 second to an enemy timer every 8 seconds

abilities.name: Vamp
abilities.description: Steals 1 HP from an enemy every 8 seconds and heals a needy ally
abilities.label: Vamp — steals 1 HP from an enemy every 8 seconds and heals a needy ally

abilities.name: Stumble
abilities.description: Adds 1 second to an enemy timer every 8 seconds
abilities.label: Stumble — adds 1 second to an enemy timer every 8 seconds

abilities.name: Dazed
abilities.description: 20% chance a solo attack hits an ally instead
abilities.label: Dazed — 20% chance a solo attack hits an ally instead
